user.description: Select the Modbus connection the aerosmart unit is reached through and its two station addresses.

data_description.connection_entry_id: The Modbus connection this unit is reached through.
data_description.unit_ventilation: The ventilation controller's Modbus station address (default 1).
data_description.unit_heat_pump: The heat pump / hot water controller's Modbus station address (default 2).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check that the unit is reachable on the selected connection and both station addresses.
